name: cistreaming-v3
description: Dev workflow preset for the cistreaming platform v3 (NestJS + Next.js + SRS + GraphQL). Inherits full developer → nestjs/nextjs chain. Adds f-* Figma suite (f-import / f-ui-kit / f-page / f-review) replacing build-ui-kit / build-static-page / streaming-figma. Retains v2 workflow skills (dev-task / quick-fix / streaming-checkpoint) and streaming-specific rules.
